texto: A child's reaction to this type of calamity is twofold and extreme. Not knowing how deeply, powerfully, life drops anchor into its vast sources of recuperation, he is bound to envisage, at once, the very worst; yet at the same time, because of his inability to imagine death, the worst remains totally unreal to him. Gerard went on repeating: "Paul's dying; Paul's going to die"' but he did not believe it. Paul's death would be part of the dream, a dream of snow, of journeying forever.

texto: Everything one does in life, even love, occurs in an express train racing toward death. To smoke opium is to get out of the train while it is still moving. It is to concern oneself with something other than life or death.
explicacao: Citação de Jean Cocteau sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Everything one does in life, even love, occurs in an express train racing toward death. To smoke …” articula vida, love, moving em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como luto e dia-chuvoso.

texto: To be moved confuses the soul. One cannot convey these kinds of memories any more than the events of a dream......if I have complained too long, it is because my memory, no longer having any fixed abode, has to carry its luggage with it.
explicacao: Citação de Jean Cocteau sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “To be moved confuses the soul. One cannot convey these kinds of memories any more than the events…” articula reflexao, childhood, moved em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: When I write, I disturb. When I show a film, I disturb. When I exhibit my painting, I disturb, and I disturb if I don't. I have a knack for disturbing.

texto: Certainly I believe in luck. How else do you explain the success of those you don't like?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jean Cocteau: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Certainly I believe in luck. How else do you explain the success of those you don't like?” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, success, certainly pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: I have lost my seven best friends, which is to say God has had mercy on me seven times without realizing it. He lent a friendship, took it from me, sent me another.
